title: Formal invariant property suite for all three circuits

artifacts.description: Certora CVL property file defining all 15+ named invariants across Identity, Credential, and Delegation circuits
circom_tester harness verifying no uint64 signal exceeds 2^64-1 after range checks, covering all three circuits
Property tests asserting distinct (secret, scope) and (credCommitment, nonce) pairs produce distinct nullifier outputs
Assertion harness verifying delegateeScope AND NOT delegatorScope == 0 for all valid Delegation circuit witnesses
Property tests asserting delegateeExpiry <= delegatorExpiry for all satisfying Delegation witnesses
Human-readable registry of all named properties with circuit reference, signal names, and formal statement
CI-runnable shell script that executes all invariant test suites and exits non-zero on any failure

steps: Audit all three circuit source files (Identity, Credential, Delegation) to enumerate every signal, constraint, and output wire
Catalogue all uint64-range-checked signals per circuit; map each to its Num2Bits or LessThan constraint
Draft property registry (property_registry.md) listing 15+ named properties with circuit, signal references, and formal statement
Implement field_overflow.test.js: for each uint64 signal, generate witnesses at boundary values (0, 2^64-1, 2^64) and assert constraint satisfaction/rejection

Implement nullifier_uniqueness.test.js: use property-based generation (fast-check or similar) to sample 500+ distinct (secret, scope) pairs and assert pairwise distinct nullifier outputs; repeat for (credCommitment, nonce)
Implement delegation_scope_monotonicity.test.js: enumerate representative scope bitmask pairs; assert delegateeScope & ~delegatorScope === 0 for valid witnesses and constraint failure for violations
Implement delegation_expiry_narrowing.test.js: generate witnesses with delegateeExpiry > delegatorExpiry and assert constraint rejection; assert acceptance for delegateeExpiry <= delegatorExpiry
Translate property registry into circuit_invariants.cvl using Certora CVL syntax for any Solidity verifier contracts wrapping circuit output verification
Wire all test files into scripts/run_invariants.sh with parallel execution and aggregated exit code
Add run_invariants.sh as a step in CI workflow (GitHub Actions or equivalent) gated on circuit source changes
Validate harness completeness: confirm at least 15 distinct named properties are exercised with at least one passing and one rejection witness per property
Document false-positive risk for probabilistic uniqueness tests and set collision probability bound <= 2^-64
